violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Bare wood surfaces exposed in the kitchen.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Inside ice machine needs cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Outside of ice machine needs cleaned.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Ceiling tiles in need of repair in the kitchen.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
